creator: cy@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to amendlik from comment #49)
Thanks. I managed to get that far. Have yet to test it on the VMs at $JOB.

I'll be pretty much AFK for the next two weeks with spotty access to a keyboard during that time.

Have you tried it with openssh-portable-gssapi yet?

Can you also list the principal you're trying to use using the kadmin getprinc command? This will tell us what cipher the key is encrypted with.
